conditions.junction: ballistic bulk Si perfect crystal, transport (100); device and both leads the same crystal
conditions.lead: transverse 8x8 conventional cells (4.34 nm), 512 atoms per slice, Tersoff (1989) potential, cutoff 5.6 A, a0 = 5.4321148 A
conditions.precision: frozen eskm reference output (eskm commit cc5a5fc1); MESCAL reproduces it on the CPU complex128 path (source of truth; GPU complex64 is the fast path, within 1e-3 of CPU)

source.detail: Ballistic transmission peak of the bulk-Si golden curve: T12 = 278.983249 at nu = 6.07824268 THz (279 open lead channels, per-atom 0.544921875 = 279/512), read verbatim from the committed MESCAL artifact reference/fixtures/level2_bulk_si_n8.npz (arrays nu_thz, T12, n_channels, per_atom). Embedded provenance JSON verbatim: "system": "bulk Si perfect crystal, transport (100), transverse 8x8 conventional cells (4.34 nm)", "eskm_commit": "cc5a5fc1ddb6589c7b4c8b4a3fdef6ef9bc0d2f7", "potential_sha256": "5fcf6d8fa08f4c024f295c803b9dc2aab2a0b103f4c14d555846f3765f006338", "cutoff_A": 5.6, "grid": "wLinearSet 0.05 17.0 240", "a0_A": 5.4321148, "atoms_per_slice": 512, "engine": "LAMMPS dynamical_matrix eskm (kaldo env)", "date": "2026-07-11", invariants all_ok true (unitarity_max 5.0e-7, reciprocity_max 5.9e-7, ballistic_max_dev 0.019516).
